zh.lifeSummary: 當Gerard de Furnival於大約1202年出生在英國英格蘭賀特福爾格亞特 蒙登時，他的父親Gerard de Furnival28歲，母親Maud Luvetot25歲。他於1234年之後與Christiana Ledet結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1242年1月9日在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾布頓享年41歲，埋葬在英國諾廷加姆爾沃可索普。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Furnival
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman: locative name from Fourneville (Calvados), Fournival in Saint-Just-en-Chaussée (Oise), or Fournival in Saint-Julien-sur-Sarthe (Orne).

nameMeanings.name: Gerard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It is derived from gār, gēr ‘spear’ + hard ‘brave, hardy, strong’. In the later Middle Ages this was a more common name than Gerald , with which it was sometimes confused. Nowadays it is less common, surviving mainly among Roman Catholics, in honour of the many saints of this name.

variants.name: Gerrard
meanings: Variant spelling of   Gerard  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Jerrard
meanings: Rare variant spelling of   Gerard  , probably influenced by the form of the modern surname, if not a transferred use.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Gerard de Furnival was born about 1202, in Great Munden, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Gerard de Furnival, was 28 and his mother, Maud Luvetot, was 25. He married Christiana Ledet after 1234. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died about 9 January 1242, in Boughton, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 41, and was buried in Worksop, Nottinghamshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gerard de Furnival est né environ 1202, à Great Munden, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Gerard de Furnival, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Maud Luvetot, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Christiana Ledet après 1234. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé environ 9 janvier 1242, à Boughton, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterré à Worksop, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gerard de Furnival um 1202 in Great Munden, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gerard de Furnival 28 und seine Mutter Maud Luvetot 25. Er hat nach 1234 Christiana Ledet geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb um 9. Januar 1242 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Boughton, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Worksop, Nottinghamshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gerard de Furnival è nato il circa 1202 nel Great Munden, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Gerard de Furnival, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Maud Luvetot, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Christiana Ledet dopo il 1234. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì circa 9 gennaio 1242, nel Boughton, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 41 anni, e fu sepolto a Worksop, Nottinghamshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Gerard de Furnivalが約1202年にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアグレアト ムンデンで生まれた時，父Gerard de Furnivalは28歳，母Maud Luvetotは25歳であった。1234年以後にChristiana Ledetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は約1242年1月9日にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアボウトンで41歳で死去し，イギリスノッティンガムシュアイアウオルクソップにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Gerard de Furnival(이)가 대략 1202년 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 그리트 먼든에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gerard de Furnival(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud Luvetot(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1234년 이후 Christiana Ledet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1242년 1월 9일 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 부그h턴에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노틴그함실르 워크소프에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gerard de Furnival nasceu aproximadamente 1202, em Great Munden, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Gerard de Furnival, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Maud Luvetot, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Christiana Ledet após 1234. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 9 de janeiro de 1242, em Boughton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 41 anos, e foi sepultado em Worksop, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gerard de Furnival родился около 1202 г. в местности грит мунден, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Gerard de Furnival было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud Luvetot, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Christiana Ledet после 1234 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер около 9 января 1242 г. в местности боугтон, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 41 год и был похоронен в местности ворксоп, ноттингхамшир, Англия.
